headline: WST Stock Up Nearly 33% YTD: Will the Uptrend Continue in the Rest of 2026?
summary: WST has surged nearly 33% YTD as strong earnings, GLP-1 demand and biologics growth fuel momentum that could extend through 2026.

headline: Ecolab Closes CoolIT Acquisition, Strengthens AI Cooling Portfolio
summary: ECL's $4.75B CoolIT acquisition boosts its AI cooling portfolio and positions High-Tech as a major long-term growth engine.

headline: Butterfly Network Expands Handheld Ultrasound Reach in Brazil
summary: BFLY launches Butterfly iQ+ and iQ3 in Brazil, expanding its handheld ultrasound reach into a major Latin American medical device market.
